root_text.an4.109:1.8: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, cattāro rukkhūpamā puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmiṁ.
root_text.an4.109:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo pheggu hoti phegguparivāro?
root_text.an4.109:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo dussīlo hoti pāpadhammo;
root_text.an4.109:2.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo pheggu hoti phegguparivāro.
root_text.an4.109:2.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, rukkho pheggu phegguparivāro;
root_text.an4.109:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo pheggu hoti sāraparivāro?
root_text.an4.109:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo dussīlo hoti pāpadhammo;
root_text.an4.109:3.3: parisā ca khvassa hoti sīlavatī kalyāṇadhammā.
root_text.an4.109:3.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo pheggu hoti sāraparivāro.
root_text.an4.109:3.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, rukkho pheggu sāraparivāro;
root_text.an4.109:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo sāro hoti phegguparivāro?
root_text.an4.109:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlavā hoti kalyāṇadhammo;
root_text.an4.109:4.3: parisā ca khvassa hoti dussīlā pāpadhammā.
root_text.an4.109:4.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo sāro hoti phegguparivāro.
root_text.an4.109:4.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, rukkho sāro phegguparivāro;
root_text.an4.109:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo sāro hoti sāraparivāro?
root_text.an4.109:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlavā hoti kalyāṇadhammo;
root_text.an4.109:5.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo sāro hoti sāraparivāro.
root_text.an4.109:5.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, rukkho sāro sāraparivāro;
root_text.an4.109:5.7: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro rukkhūpamā puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.109:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these four kinds of tree.
translation_text.an4.109:1.3: One is a softwood surrounded by softwoods,
translation_text.an4.109:1.4: one is a softwood surrounded by hardwoods,
translation_text.an4.109:1.5: one is a hardwood surrounded by softwoods, and
translation_text.an4.109:1.6: one is a hardwood surrounded by hardwoods.
translation_text.an4.109:1.7: These are the four kinds of tree.
translation_text.an4.109:1.8: In the same way, these four individuals similar to trees are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.109:1.10: One is a softwood surrounded by softwoods,
translation_text.an4.109:1.11: one is a softwood surrounded by hardwoods,
translation_text.an4.109:1.12: one is a hardwood surrounded by softwoods, and
translation_text.an4.109:1.13: one is a hardwood surrounded by hardwoods.
translation_text.an4.109:2.1: And how is an individual a softwood surrounded by softwoods?
translation_text.an4.109:2.2: It’s when an individual is unethical, of bad character,
translation_text.an4.109:2.3: and their followers are the same.
translation_text.an4.109:2.4: That’s how an individual is a softwood surrounded by softwoods.
translation_text.an4.109:2.5: That individual is like a softwood tree that’s surrounded by softwoods, I say.
translation_text.an4.109:3.1: And how is an individual a softwood surrounded by hardwoods?
translation_text.an4.109:3.2: It’s when an individual is unethical, of bad character,
translation_text.an4.109:3.3: but their followers are ethical, of good character. …
translation_text.an4.109:4.1: And how is an individual a hardwood surrounded by softwoods?
translation_text.an4.109:4.2: It’s when an individual is ethical, of good character,
translation_text.an4.109:4.3: but their followers are unethical, of bad character. …
translation_text.an4.109:5.1: And how is an individual a hardwood surrounded by hardwoods?
translation_text.an4.109:5.2: It’s when an individual is ethical, of good character,
translation_text.an4.109:5.3: and their followers are the same.
translation_text.an4.109:5.7: These four individuals similar to trees are found in the world.”
